title: CostSnapshot
description: One entry in skills-meta/cost.jsonl — an advisory, aggregates-only ccusage cost snapshot captured at ship time. Never carries transcript content. See docs/ccusage-metrics-adoption.md and briefs/ccusage-metrics-spec.md FR-161..FR-167.

task.description: Canonical task slug — same identity as briefs/<task>-state.json.

captured_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of capture (not of the measured window).

runtime.description: Which runtime(s) the underlying transcripts came from; cross-runtime when ccusage aggregated more than one source.

join_method.description: How the snapshot was attributed to this task. Never an exact session join — see attribution.

window.description: The [since, until] bound ccusage was queried over. Either bound may be null when a ledger `at` timestamp was absent (OQ-2) — the capture degrades gracefully rather than guessing.

attribution.description: Always 'approximate' — no session ids exist to disambiguate concurrent sessions in the same window (OQ-1). Never present as exact.

cost_mode.description: ccusage cost mode used for this capture, recorded for reproducibility (FR-162).

offline.description: Always true — --offline is mandatory so pricing is pinned and results are deterministic (FR-162).

totals.description: Aggregate token counts and derived USD figure only — never transcript content (FR-164).

phases.description: Optional per-phase breakdown. Omitted entirely when per-phase windows overlap intractably (OQ-3) — a task-level-only snapshot is conformant, not a failure.
